title: Nostalgia Features: Alpha
description: Removes certain generation features not from Alpha.
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

This mod removes the following features:
- Deepslate
- Grass (plant)
- Pumpkins
- Kelp and seagrass
- Copper ore
- Andesite/Diorite/Granite/Tuff
- Post-beta flowers
- Underwater magma
- Infested stone
- Amethyst Geodes
- Glow lichen
- Bamboo

To further bring the alpha feel:

[No More Structures: Full](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-more-structures-full) (gets rid of every structure) - by me

[Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta) (brings back old terrain from any version of the game)

[Nostalgia Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks) (brings back lots of gameplay, visual and sound elements of the game)

[Golden Days](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) (brings back the old textures)

[Golden Days Alpha](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days-alpha) (brings back the old alpha colours and textures, an addon for Golden Days Base)
